div1.entryFree: Covert, adj secret, hid, disguised: to lock it in the wards of c. bosom, Meas. V, 10. c. enmity, H4B Ind. Meas. V, 10 the --est sheltered traitor, R3 III, 5, 33. how c. matters may be best disclosed, Caes. IV, 1, 46. that under c. and convenient seeming hast practised on man's life, Lr. III, 2, 56.
